commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=4ab7045f471e2aa764aa0d329ba929f3ba2b763f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR propagates non-deliverable terminal-turn metadata into embedded-run metadata, adds one auto-retry, adds specific failure copy, and covers the new path with mocked auto-reply tests.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +89. Total +144 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main creates the non_deliverable_terminal_turn marker but does not carry it to specific reply copy, and this PR changes that exact path. I did not run the live Telegram load reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review and contributor revision are needed because this external PR has blocking retry/success-path findings, mock-only proof, and an unresolved retry-policy decision.

target.title: fix(agent): surface non_deliverable_terminal_turn with specific message and auto-retry
target.body:
## Summary

When a model turn ends with `stop_reason: tool_use` but no explicit terminal delivery, the runtime classifies it as `non_deliverable_terminal_turn`. Previously, this `terminalError` was only recorded in trajectory metadata and never surfaced to the user. The user would see the generic "Something went wrong… use /new" message, which gives misleading remediation advice and hides the actual failure.

## Changes

1. **Propagate `trajectoryTerminalError`** from attempt trajectory through `EmbeddedAgentRunMeta` so the reply layer can see it
2. **Auto-retry once** for `non_deliverable_terminal_turn` — the model produced no output, so retry is idempotent and usually resolves the issue
3. **Surface a specific, actionable message** when retry is exhausted:
   > ⚠️ The model stopped between tool calls without producing a reply. Please try the same message again — this usually resolves on retry. If it persists, use /new or a lighter model.

## Files changed

- `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts` — add `trajectoryTerminalError` to return
- `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/types.ts` — add type for `trajectoryTerminalError`
- `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/types.ts` — add to `EmbeddedAgentRunMeta`
- `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts` — propagate through meta
- `src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-failure-copy.ts` — add user-facing message constant
- `src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts` — auto-retry + specific message
- `src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts` — 3 new tests for the new code paths

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** `non_deliverable_terminal_turn` (stop_reason=tool_use, no delivery) surfaced as generic "Something went wrong… use /new" with no diagnostic signal and no retry.

**Real environment tested:** Linux x86_64, Node v22.19.0, OpenClaw main branch (commit d1ab308f5c).

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**
1. Built the patched gateway: `pnpm build` — clean, exit 0
2. Ran targeted unit tests:
   - `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-trajectory-status` — 19/19 passed
   - `pnpm test src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution` — **207/207 passed** (204 existing + 3 new)
3. Ran related module tests:
   - `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/result-fallback-classifier` — passed
   - `pnpm test src/trajectory/export` — passed
4. Ran comprehensive suites:
   - `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/` — 277/298 files passed (21 pre-existing failures in unrelated auth/failover/setup modules)
   - `pnpm test src/auto-reply/` — 297/339 files passed (42 pre-existing failures; agent-runner-execution.test.ts passed 207/207)

**Evidence after fix:**
- New tests verify 3 code paths:
  1. **Auto-retry**: `non_deliverable_terminal_turn` with empty payloads triggers a retry (embedded runner called 2×), then succeeds
  2. **Exhausted retry**: second occurrence returns `kind: "final"` with `NON_DELIVERABLE_TERMINAL_TURN_USER_TEXT` instead of generic text
  3. **No retry when fallback exhausted**: `outcome: "exhausted"` skips retry and surfaces the specific message
- `trajectoryTerminalError` field is propagated from `resolveAttemptTrajectoryTerminal` through `EmbeddedAgentRunMeta` to the reply layer
- Auto-retry uses `consumeNonDeliverableTurnRetry()` pattern (1-retry budget, same as `consumeTransientHttpRetry`)

**Observed result after fix:**
- All 207 agent-runner-execution tests pass (no regressions)
- Type checker passes on changed files
- Build succeeds (exit 0)
- The `non_deliverable_terminal_turn` terminal error no longer silently falls through to generic text — it triggers an auto-retry, and on exhaustion surfaces actionable guidance

**What was not tested:**
- Full end-to-end reproduction with Telegram DM under heavy cacheRead load (requires production-like environment with live API keys and sustained load to trigger the race between stop_reason=tool_use and turn closure)
- Actual retry trigger under production load conditions

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
